use std::sync::Arc;

struct SharedState {
    config: Arc<Config>,
    metrics: Arc<Metrics>,
}

fn process_batch(items: &[Item], state: &SharedState) {
    let cfg = &state.config;
    let m = &state.metrics;
    for item in items {
        for sub in &item.children {
            let _ = process_one(sub, cfg, m);
        }
    }
}

fn process_one(_item: &Item, _cfg: &Config, _m: &Metrics) -> Result<(), ()> {
    Ok(())
}

struct Config;
struct Metrics;
struct Item {
    children: Vec<SubItem>,
}
struct SubItem;
